cause_analysis.narrative: Deka Lash churned on 2026-03-17 after 87 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 56-day silence starting 2026-01-20. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-17 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Cancel the Zoca subscription\n\nBody: Hi Apurvaa, Understood! We will be shutting down end of this month an…" — no outbound response in 28 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-17 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Cancel the Zoca subscription\n\nBody: Hi Apurvaa, Understood! We will be shutting down end of this month an…" — no outbound response in 28 days.
